revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:走水神社]]
'''Hashirimizu Shrine''' (走水神社) refers to multiple Shinto shrines in Japan.
* {{ill|Hashirimizu Shrine (Yokosuka)|ja|走水神社 (横須賀市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hashirimizu Shrine (Yokosuka)|qq=}} (はしりみずじんじゃ) -- Located in [[:en:Yokosuka City|Yokosuka City]], {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. This shrine is associated with the legend of [[Tachibanahime-no-Mikoto|Ototachibana-hime]]. * {{ill|Hashirimizu Shrine (Kobe)|ja|走水神社 (神戸市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hashirimizu Shrine (Kobe)|qq=}} (はしうどじんじゃ) -- Located in [[:en:Chuo Ward|Chuo Ward]], [[:en:Kobe City|Kobe City]], {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}} (formerly Hashirimizu Village).
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|走水神社|version=39201705|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:走水神社]]
<!--Hashirimizu Shrine--><!--Hashirimizu Shrine--> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{wikidata link|Q11636077}} [[Category:Short pages to be excluded since they are disambiguations]] [[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
